name: Qara Khitai (Western Liao)
note: Empire founded by Khitan refugees from the Jurchen conquest of the Liao dynasty. Yelu Dashi defeated the Seljuk Sultan Sanjar at the Battle of Qatwan (1141) — reverberating through Christendom as the legend of Prester John. Conquered by the Mongols (Kuchlug and then Genghis Khan).
